description: Join the numbers and get to the 2048 tile! A mathematically addictive puzzle game.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Flap your way through the pipes in this addictive arcade classic.

title: Snake Classic
description: The timeless game of snake. Eat the apples and grow as long as possible.

title: Tetris
description: Stack the blocks and clear the lines in the ultimate puzzle challenge.

title: Chess
description: The classic game of strategy. Test your wits against the computer.

description: Navigate a ball down a steep slope in this fast-paced infinite runner.

title: Pac-Man
description: Chomp your way through the maze and avoid the ghosts.

title: Solitaire
description: Clear all the cards in this relaxing single-player card game.
